# jamfschool_device (Data Source)

Use this data source to look up a Jamf School device by UDID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "jamfschool_device" "example" {
  udid = "00008020-001234567890002E"
}

output "device_name" {
  value = data.jamfschool_device.example.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `udid` (String) UDID of the device.

### Read-Only

- `battery_level` (Number) Battery level.
- `enroll_type` (String) Enrollment type.
- `in_trash` (Boolean) Whether the device is in trash.
- `is_managed` (Boolean) Whether the device is managed.
- `is_supervised` (Boolean) Whether the device is supervised.
- `last_checkin` (String) Last check-in time.
- `location_id` (Number) Location ID.
- `model_identifier` (String) Model identifier.
- `model_name` (String) Model name.
- `name` (String) Device name.
- `notes` (String) Notes.
- `os_prefix` (String) OS prefix (e.g. iOS, macOS).
- `os_version` (String) OS version.
- `serial_number` (String) Serial number.
- `total_capacity` (Number) Total storage capacity.
